3232420.name: DREAMERS Demo
3232420.description:
DREAMERS Demo: get a taste of the heartfelt adventure that awaits!

Step into the world of DREAMERS and get a taste of the heartfelt adventure that awaits.
In this exclusive demo, you'll meet two of the three unique protagonists as they prepare for their journey through a vibrant, colorful world brought to life with stunning low-poly 3D visuals.

Explore a carefully chosen selection of diverse regions, each filled with unique challenges, puzzles, and mysteries waiting to be uncovered.
Immerse yourself in side quests, mini-games, and try your hand at upgrading vehicles, while catching a glimpse of the rich story and melancholic atmosphere that define DREAMERS.

With its nostalgic yet modern feel, evocative soundtrack, and plenty of surprises, this demo offers a window into the full experience. Ready to embark on your adventure? Plug in your controller and play DREAMERS: Demo Edition now and prepare for the epic journey ahead!
3232420.supported_languages:
英语*, 意大利语, 日语, 俄语, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
